{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317541567F82EC4FAF6BFE09AE3"}"},"total":901},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7152811444915667753","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写的是男医生，写作手法很细致，作者感觉是女生。加油！很看好。留了很多线索，不急着直入到朝堂类更高的环境，地气一些会更耐看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1665393784,"group_id":"7128763324828748831","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ThVEQMheeRDYjRot+rgDI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"92744761869","user_name":"轻风疾羽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92744761869","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7128763324828748831","book_info":{"abstract":"中医学研究院毕业的苏离，一朝不幸穿越到大楚王朝，眼看一家人饿得面黄肌瘦，苏离心里着急啊，于是上山采药，卖卖药材来改善家里的伙食。
这一世的苏离志向不够远大，就想远离职场上的勾心斗角，安安心心地在村里当个赤脚大夫，平时卖卖草药，闲暇时候种种地，养养鱼，时不时给乡亲们治一下小病小痛，这悠闲的生活可不就是香嘛！
可是这不科学啊，这草药卖着卖着，怎么就成了传世神医！这地种着种着，怎么还能食邑百户了！
还有为啥他那小型乡村别墅里总有一些陌生人出现，请他医治各种疑难杂症，治病也就算了，为啥隔壁村母牛生崽难产也来找他……
更离谱的是突然有一天竟然有人跑出来告诉他自己其实是当朝驸马爷，离谱，简直是太离谱了！
朝堂上文武百官：怎么他一农夫，也轮得到他在朝堂上发表言论吗？
大楚皇帝：朕特许的，诸位爱卿莫要眼红才是！
苏离：行吧，那我就随便讲两句……

故事偏日常，有感情线也有事业线，两者相结合体现男主的日常生活和心态，本文三观很正，单女主，不圣母。
作者声明一下：这本说是单女主，单女主，单女主哦！喜欢看后宫的读者们慎入哈！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/815b84a9320f368268a12a01158ab1e6","author":"苏离离","author_id":"","book_id":"7128763324828748831","book_name":"惊世驸马爷，他医手遮天","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b8a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7128764029849633287","read_count":"10590","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1233368"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"606","tags":"历史古代,历史,乡村,穿越,单女主,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ffe1a2f0248d6b648748d953e65e7d30~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779443655&x-signature=zma3gUjg2FTTvsN%2BrB%2BCVADmMns%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2867177058216335","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.1693463e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317541567F82EC4FAF6BFE09AE3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,
